issues.description: Rest action is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may rest' (optional). Rest action must include optional:true flag.
Rest target is AllOwnCharacters but card specifies exactly '2 of your Characters'. Target must use count:2 constraint, not scope:AllOwnCharacters.
DrawCard action should be conditional on Rest action completion. Current DSL executes both independently; card requires Rest as condition for Draw.
